reviews.review_text: The seller actively hid a body dent and misrepresented overdue transmission service, while being consistently evasive about other critical maintenance details.
revealed_facts: Quarter-sized dent on passenger rear fender with minor paint cracking, not visible in listing photos
Transmission fluid service overdue by 18,000 miles; last changed at 61,000 instead of recommended 45,000-mile intervals

reviews.review_text: Seller actively hid a significant prior front-end collision with frame damage and misrepresented the severity of a known engine misfire issue (P0302), claiming the car ran 'smooth as butter' when it did not.
revealed_facts: Vehicle was involved in moderate front-end collision in 2019; airbags did not deploy but frame was pulled and repaired at independent shop
Cylinder 2 misfire code P0302 intermittently appears; likely failing ignition coil or early valve seat issue common to 3.6L Pentastar
Driver seat foam worn through on bolster; seat heater element no longer functions on driver side
